graphEdges: select p.target_tenant_id as tenant_id, p.target_user_id as user_id, 'peer_target'::text as reason from peer_link_requests p, params seed where p.tenant_id = seed.tenant_id and p.user_id = seed.user_id
select p.tenant_id, p.user_id, 'peer_requester'::text as reason from peer_link_requests p, params seed where p.target_tenant_id = seed.tenant_id and p.target_user_id = seed.user_id

select m.sender_tenant_id as tenant_id, m.sender_user_id as user_id, 'chat_sender'::text as reason from profile_chat_messages m, params seed where m.created_at >= seed.since_at and ((m.tenant_id = seed.tenant_id and m.user_id = seed.user_id) or (m.sender_tenant_id = seed.tenant_id and m.sender_user_id = seed.user_id) or (m.recipient_tenant_id = seed.tenant_id and m.recipient_user_id = seed.user_id)) and m.sender_user_id <> '' and left(m.sender_user_id, 2) <> '__'

select m.recipient_tenant_id as tenant_id, m.recipient_user_id as user_id, 'chat_recipient'::text as reason from profile_chat_messages m, params seed where m.created_at >= seed.since_at and ((m.tenant_id = seed.tenant_id and m.user_id = seed.user_id) or (m.sender_tenant_id = seed.tenant_id and m.sender_user_id = seed.user_id) or (m.recipient_tenant_id = seed.tenant_id and m.recipient_user_id = seed.user_id)) and m.recipient_user_id <> '' and left(m.recipient_user_id, 2) <> '__'

select r.actor_tenant_id as tenant_id, r.actor_user_id as user_id, 'reaction_actor'::text as reason from timeline_reactions r, params seed where r.updated_at >= seed.since_at and r.tenant_id = seed.tenant_id and r.user_id = seed.user_id and r.actor_user_id <> ''

select r.tenant_id, r.user_id, 'reaction_owner'::text as reason from timeline_reactions r, params seed where r.updated_at >= seed.since_at and r.actor_tenant_id = seed.tenant_id and r.actor_user_id = seed.user_id

select c.actor_tenant_id as tenant_id, c.actor_user_id as user_id, 'comment_actor'::text as reason from timeline_comments c, params seed where c.created_at >= seed.since_at and c.tenant_id = seed.tenant_id and c.user_id = seed.user_id and c.actor_user_id <> ''

select c.tenant_id, c.user_id, 'comment_owner'::text as reason from timeline_comments c, params seed where c.created_at >= seed.since_at and c.actor_tenant_id = seed.tenant_id and c.actor_user_id = seed.user_id

tables.name: profiles
tables.from: profiles p join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = p.tenant_id and g.user_id = p.user_id

tables.name: profile_sources
tables.from: profile_sources s join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = s.tenant_id and g.user_id = s.user_id

tables.name: agent_activities
tables.from: agent_activities a join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = a.tenant_id and g.user_id = a.user_id

tables.name: post_drafts
tables.from: post_drafts d join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = d.tenant_id and g.user_id = d.user_id
tables.where: d.updated_at >= (select since_at from params) or d.status in ('approved', 'published', 'scheduled')

tables.name: network_posts
tables.from: network_posts n join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = n.tenant_id and g.user_id = n.user_id

tables.name: peer_link_requests
tables.from: peer_link_requests p
tables.where: exists (select 1 from graph_keys g where g.tenant_id = p.tenant_id and g.user_id = p.user_id) or exists (select 1 from graph_keys g where g.tenant_id = p.target_tenant_id and g.user_id = p.target_user_id)
tables.deletePredicate: (t.tenant_id = g.tenant_id and t.user_id = g.user_id) or (t.target_tenant_id = g.tenant_id and t.target_user_id = g.user_id)

tables.name: profile_chat_messages
tables.from: profile_chat_messages m
tables.where: m.created_at >= (select since_at from params) and (exists (select 1 from graph_keys g where g.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and g.user_id = m.user_id) or exists (select 1 from graph_keys g where g.tenant_id = m.sender_tenant_id and g.user_id = m.sender_user_id) or exists (select 1 from graph_keys g where g.tenant_id = m.recipient_tenant_id and g.user_id = m.recipient_user_id))
tables.deletePredicate: (t.tenant_id = g.tenant_id and t.user_id = g.user_id) or (t.sender_tenant_id = g.tenant_id and t.sender_user_id = g.user_id) or (t.recipient_tenant_id = g.tenant_id and t.recipient_user_id = g.user_id)

tables.name: timeline_reactions
tables.from: timeline_reactions r
tables.where: r.updated_at >= (select since_at from params) and (exists (select 1 from graph_keys g where g.tenant_id = r.tenant_id and g.user_id = r.user_id) or exists (select 1 from graph_keys g where g.tenant_id = r.actor_tenant_id and g.user_id = r.actor_user_id))
tables.deletePredicate: (t.tenant_id = g.tenant_id and t.user_id = g.user_id) or (t.actor_tenant_id = g.tenant_id and t.actor_user_id = g.user_id)

tables.name: timeline_comments
tables.from: timeline_comments c
tables.where: c.created_at >= (select since_at from params) and (exists (select 1 from graph_keys g where g.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and g.user_id = c.user_id) or exists (select 1 from graph_keys g where g.tenant_id = c.actor_tenant_id and g.user_id = c.actor_user_id))
tables.deletePredicate: (t.tenant_id = g.tenant_id and t.user_id = g.user_id) or (t.actor_tenant_id = g.tenant_id and t.actor_user_id = g.user_id)

tables.name: profile_agent_run_receipts
tables.from: profile_agent_run_receipts r join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = r.tenant_id and g.user_id = r.user_id

tables.name: profile_source_observations
tables.from: profile_source_observations o join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = o.tenant_id and g.user_id = o.user_id

tables.name: profile_fact_candidates
tables.from: profile_fact_candidates f join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = f.tenant_id and g.user_id = f.user_id

tables.name: provider_connections
tables.from: provider_connections pc join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = pc.tenant_id and g.user_id = pc.user_id

tables.name: distribution_publish_attempts
tables.from: distribution_publish_attempts a join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = a.tenant_id and g.user_id = a.user_id

tables.name: user_ai_settings
tables.from: user_ai_settings s join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = s.tenant_id and g.user_id = s.user_id

tables.name: actionproof_consumptions
tables.from: actionproof_consumptions c join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and g.user_id = c.user_id

tables.name: mobile_channel_links
tables.from: mobile_channel_links l join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and g.user_id = l.user_id

tables.name: background_jobs
tables.from: background_jobs b join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = b.tenant_id and g.user_id = b.user_id
tables.where: b.created_at >= (select since_at from params) or b.status in ('queued', 'running', 'retrying')

tables.name: public_profiles_index
tables.from: public_profiles_index p join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = p.tenant_id and g.user_id = p.user_id

tables.name: public_timeline_posts
tables.from: public_timeline_posts p join graph_keys g on g.tenant_id = p.tenant_id and g.user_id = p.user_id
